## Describe the bug

A clear description of what's wrong.

## To reproduce

The exact prompt or tool call(s) that triggered it:

1. ...
2. ...

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / logs

If applicable, paste relevant output (server stderr, tool error text) or a screenshot.

- Xcode version (`xcodebuild -version`):

## Additional context

Anything else that might help (app being automated, whether the persistent daemon was running, etc.).
